languages.text: {n}Некрон безмолвствует, не спеша удостоить вас дальнейшего разговора.{/n}
{n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Некрон безмолвствует, не спеша удостоить вас дальнейшего разговора.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}
{n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}
{n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}太空死灵一言不发，显然懒得继续屈尊和你交谈。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}太空死灵一言不发，显然懒得继续屈尊和你交谈。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El Necrón guarda silencio, ya que considera que no mereces seguir conversando con él.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El Necrón guarda silencio, ya que considera que no mereces seguir conversando con él.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le Nécron garde le silence, répugnant à vous faire l'honneur de sa conversation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le Nécron garde le silence, répugnant à vous faire l'honneur de sa conversation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Daha fazla konuşarak seni onurlandırmak istemeyen Nekron, hiçbir şey söylemiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Daha fazla konuşarak seni onurlandırmak istemeyen Nekron, hiçbir şey söylemiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Necron sagt nichts und scheint keine Eile zu haben, dich eines weiteren Wortes zu würdigen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Necron sagt nichts und scheint keine Eile zu haben, dich eines weiteren Wortes zu würdigen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ネクロンの言葉はなかった。あなたにさらに話しかける気はないようだった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron says nothing, in no hurry to dignify you with further conversation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ネクロンの言葉はなかった。あなたにさらに話しかける気はないようだった。{/n}
